resources.string: Run a local ProxyT instance on Android and advertise it over the phone’s private hotspot IP.
Check the readiness items below, then press Start. After the proxy is running, copy the control URL to the client device.
The proxy is running. Join this phone’s hotspot from the client device, then copy the control URL shown here.
The proxy is not healthy yet. Fix the readiness issues below or review Advanced Diagnostics for more detail.
This device looks ready to host the hotspot control URL.
One or more readiness checks still need attention before this device is reliable.
Notifications: action needed before the proxy can start on Android 13+
Hotspot/local IP: detected and ready for a generated control URL
Hotspot/local IP: no private hotspot or LAN address detected yet
Battery/background limits: app is exempt from battery optimization
Battery/background limits: battery optimization is still active
Disable battery optimization before relying on this phone as a hotspot control server. Some Android builds will stop or throttle the proxy in the background.
Motorola-class Android builds are especially aggressive here. If battery optimization stays enabled, the hotspot proxy may start and then become unreachable in the background.
Optional. Leave blank to build a local hotspot/LAN URL from the selected private IP.
Detected local IP for generated URL
Used only when Advertised base URL is blank.
Point the iPhone Tailscale client at the advertised URL shown above. For hotspot-only use, this should usually be an RFC1918 address like http://192.168.43.1:8080.
No private hotspot/LAN IPv4 address detected yet. You can still enter the advertised URL manually.
Not serving a control URL right now.
Leave the app open and point your client at the active URL shown above.
Start the proxy when you are ready to serve requests.
Notification permission required before starting the proxy
This app depends on foreground-service notifications. Grant notification permission on Android 13 or newer before starting the proxy.
Notification permission was denied. Open app settings, allow notifications, and then try starting the proxy again.
Battery optimization is still enabled for this app. Some devices will throttle or stop hotspot proxy traffic unless you exempt the app.
Battery optimization is already disabled for this app.
The local proxy listener did not answer after the process started.
Verify the listen port is still reachable on the phone, then retry. Hotspot clients may use the advertised URL separately.
